title: Skeleton Lord returns linked summon when invalidated

card.rawText: When summoned, take control of 1 of your opponent's creatures in their cemetery as your Limited Summon. Return it back to your opponent's cemetery if this creature leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Skeleton Lord returns linked summon when invalidated
plan.summary: If Skeleton Lord leaves, changes control, or the effect is negated, verify the linked Limited Summon returns to opponent cemetery.

notes: Place Skeleton Lord with a linked controlled Limited Summon.

When summoned, take control of 1 of your opponent's creatures in their cemetery as your Limited Summon. Return it back to your opponent's cemetery if this creature leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

steps: Return linked Limited Summon to opponent cemetery.
